fullArticle:
Listings for a commemorative “One Piece” trading card on a major thrifting site ahead of its release. (Captured from a flea market platform’s website)

Bookstores across Japan are on alert ahead of the July 13 release of the “Weekly Shonen Jump” comic anthology published by Shueisha Inc.

The magazine comes bundled with a commemorative card for the 29th anniversary of the popular manga series “One Piece.” Shops are concerned that a deluge of customers may cause disruptions and confusion.

Scalping is already rampant, even before the latest issue of the weekly magazine goes on sale, with the card available at a high markup on flea market sites. Aside from being a collectible, it is part of the “One Piece” trading card game, which was launched worldwide in 2022 to mark the series’ 25th anniv...
